dailyNews.description: While Iran hits back against US and Israeli attacks with missiles and drones, it is also fighting a propaganda war with a Lego-style animation video complete with toy renditions...

dailyNews.title: Pete Hegseth vows ‘most intense day’ of US strikes against Iran
dailyNews.description: Pete Hegseth says Donald Trump controls the pace of the war, but acknowledges that Israel has its own objectives.

dailyNews.title: Protesters block Iran’s women’s football team bus en route to airport
dailyNews.description: Protesters blocked a bus carrying Iran’s women’s football team in Australia after 5 players slipped away to seek asylum.

dailyNews.title: US defence chief ends Iran war briefing with prayer for troops
dailyNews.description: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth recited a prayer for US troops attacking Iran, asking for strength and protection.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day: ‘A man who procrastinates…’ — The life lesson behind Hunter S. Thompson’s famous words
dailyNews.description: Hunter S. Thompson’s quote, “A man who procrastinates in his choosing will inevitably have his choice made for him by circumstance,” highlights the dangers of delaying decisions.

dailyNews.title: Poll shows majority Americans oppose attack on Iran, 77% fear terror attack on US soil in retaliation
dailyNews.description: A majority of American voters do not support sending ground troops into Iran, but they also do not expect the conflict to end quickly. While most do not support US attack on Iran, many fear a terror attack on US soil in retaliation

dailyNews.title: Cabinet increases Jal Jeevan Mission outlay by  ₹1.51 tn, approves projects to Tamil Nadu, Bengal
dailyNews.description: The Union Cabinet has increased the Jal Jeevan Mission budget to  ₹8.7 trillion, approved road and rail projects, and granted international status to Madurai airport.

dailyNews.title: ‘Muslims don’t belong in American society’: Republican Rep. Ogles pushes ban on immigration from Muslim-majority nations
dailyNews.description: Ogles announced plans to introduce legislation that would halt immigration from several countries with predominantly Muslim populations.

dailyNews.title: Gunshots reported outside US consulate in Toronto, Canada; police probing incident
dailyNews.description: Gunshots were fired outside the US Consulate in Canada's Toronto on Tuesday (local time), The Guardian reported.

dailyNews.title: 'I just want to be able to sleep': Attacks in Iran rock cities and cut power
dailyNews.description: Iranians in Tehran and Karaj tel the BBC they are exhausted and struggling to sleep after 10 days of Israeli and US attacks.

dailyNews.title: Trump boasts ‘more fun to sink Iranian ships’, says 46 lying at the bottom of the ocean
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump has also claimed that they have won the war against Iran, but ‘have not won enough.’ He also vowed ‘ultimate victory’ against the Persian Gulf country.
